ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Information about mental illnesses, their treatments, and available services?
In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Medications or pills to help you with mental illnesses?
In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Psychotherapy - talking about problems that originated in your past?
In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Cognitive-behavioral therapy - learning how to change your thoughts, behaviors and emotions?
In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Counseling - help to talk about your problems?
In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Help to solve daily problems like where to live or money issues?
In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Help to improve your ability to work or use your time in other ways?
In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Help to improve your ability to take care of yourself or your home?
In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Help to meet people that can provide you with support and company?
In the past 12 months, do you think you have needed - Other - example:
Did you receive any of these types of help that you needed?
If your answer is no, did any of the following reasons stop you from getting any of these types of help? - I preferred to handle it myself.
If your answer is no, did any of the following reasons stop you from getting any of these types of help? - I didn't think anything could help.
If your answer is no, did any of the following reasons stop you from getting any of these types of help? - I didn't know where I could get help.
If your answer is no, did any of the following reasons stop you from getting any of these types of help? - I was afraid of asking for help or what others would think if I did.

If your answer is no, did any of the following reasons stop you from getting any of these types of help? - I asked for help, but I didn't get it.
